Container.Name: FilamentHub
Container.Overview:
FilamentHub is a self-hosted 3D printer filament inventory manager.
Track your spool collection, log print jobs, get run-out forecasts, print QR labels, and view full usage analytics — all running on your own hardware with a single container.
Features: spool inventory, multi-color spools, print job logging, analytics, run-out forecast, QR labels, reorder list, alerts (email / Discord / webhooks), Bambu Lab AMS integration, community filament database, Spoolman import, CSV/JSON export, 5 themes, 8 accent colors, 2FA, API keys, and multi-user roles.
After starting the container, open the WebUI and create your first account. Set FRONTEND_URL to the URL your browser uses to reach this container (e.g. http://192.168.1.50 or http://192.168.1.50:8080 if you changed the port).
Generate a secure SECRET_KEY with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Secret Key
Config.Description: JWT signing key used to secure sessions. Generate one with: openssl rand -hex 32

Config.Name: Frontend URL
Config.Description: The full URL your browser uses to reach FilamentHub (no trailing slash). Use your server's LAN IP or domain. Examples: http://192.168.1.50 or http://192.168.1.50:8080 or https://filamenthub.yourdomain.com

Config.Name: SMTP Host
Config.Description: SMTP server hostname for password-reset emails. Leave blank to disable email — reset links will appear in the container log instead.

Config.Name: From Address
Config.Description: From address used on outgoing emails.
